Buildforfun blog posts!

How to learn

Obtained from Justin Sung vids.

  1. Optimise environment - clear distractions + get stuff ready
  2. Collect key words/chapters across topic
  3. Create hypothetical structure using keywords. Focus on scafolding and ways to group info. Big picture idea of how it all links together
  4. Read more and elaborate. Simplify if possible. Connect new info with big picture scafold. Make the new info make sense.
  5. Create questions that you can answer with new knowledge. Should be interseting questions about the big picture and help complete it.
  6. Break time! Do chores.
  7. Answer your questions. Continue elaborating.
